creator: nobutaka@nobutaka.com
text:
Changes:
  1. mail/wanderlust-xemacs-mule (a slave port of mail/wanderlust-emacs) is
     renamed to mail/wanderlust-xemacs21-mule. Please repo-copy it.
     And a patch for mail/wanderlust-xemacs21-mule will be sent with another PR.
     It changes XEmacs version in Makefile of mail/wanderlust-xemacs21-mule.

  2. Install as XEmacs package on mail/wanderlust-xemacs21-mule.

  3. Depend on cookie of semi (editors/semi-*).

Removed files:
  files/wanderlust-startup.xemacs-mule.el.tmpl
  pkg/PLIST.xemacs-mule

Added files: 
  files/wanderlust-startup.xemacs21-mule.el.tmpl
  pkg/PLIST.xemacs21-mule
